VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: RSI
Focus: Medium Fighter

Packing some serious firepower, the Meteor is a sight enemies won't want to see. Taking inspiration from the iconic Mantis, this heavy fighter forgoes quantum enforcement and instead features two bespoke S5 ballistic cannons and four single-load S4 missile racks; making the Meteor a force that can light up the sky like a shooting star.

This variant features an exclusive livery and loadout for the ship.
